meaning: n.[物]麦克斯韦(磁通量单位)
examples: Maxwell listened closely as Johnson laid out his plan.
Felicity Maxwell stood by the bar and ordered a glass of wine.
One Italian example would be the Berlusconi group, while abroad Maxwell and Murdoch come to mind.
Maxwell, an internationally recognized leadership expert, has some insight into the concept of perseverance.
Maxwell clarified the elements, abilities and characteristics contained in that sometimes ambiguous, all-encompassing word.
